en: So now these are all the tuxedos that we make, and if there's anything that you like, we can make you a deal.
ko: 자, 이제 우리가 만든 턱시도는 이거예요.

en: Anything at all. But these are the three that Monica pre-approved.
ko: 하지만 모니카가 미리 승인한 건 이 세 개예요.

en: Uh, well, thanks a lot for hooking me up, Rach, and I want you to know that I want you
ko: 아, 정말 고마워요, 레이첼, 알아줬으면 해요.

en: to attend our wedding as my guest.
ko: 당신이 제 결혼식에 제 손님으로 와주셨으면 해요.

en: I'm Monica's maid of honor. Okay, don't try to blue-pin me.
Well, what's the deal with these? These look nice. Oh, they are nice.
We custom-make tuxedos for celebrities, and then when they're done with them, they just send them back.
ko: 우리는 유명인들을 위해 턱시도를 맞춤 제작해요.

en: You mean, like, for award shows? Some of them.
You mean these tuxedos have been down their red carpet with people yelling, uh, who are you wearing?
You look fabulous!
Honey, might I suggest watching a little more ESPN and a little less E?
Okay, who wore those? Um, well, it's, uh, this one's Tom Brokaw.
Not bad. This one is, uh, Paul O'Neill.
Who's that? He plays for the Yankees.
Seriously, ESPN. Just once in a while.
Have it on in the background.
Ooh, this one was Pierce Brosnan. Pierce Brosnan?
Uh-huh. Are you serious? Dulles. 007?
This is James Bond's tux? Yeah.
Oh, I have to get married in James Bond's tux. Come on.
It's a pretty cool tux. Ah, and it's not just that.
ko: 정말 멋진 턱시도야. 단순한 게 아니야.

en: I would be England's most powerful weapon, a jet-setting heartbreaker on Her Majesty's
ko: 나는 영국의 가장 강력한 무기가 될 거야,

en: Secret Service, a man who fears no one, with a license to kill.
ko: 누구도 두려워하지 않는, 킬 라이센스를 가진 남자. 고마워.

en: Would Monica let me wear this?
We should really learn how to play the real way. I like our way.
ko: 우리는 진짜로 플레이하는 법을 배워야 해.

en: Oh, come on. Hey. Chess.
Good. Nice move. Yeah.
Hey. Hey. So, Joey, I just hooked Ross and Chandler up with some tuxedos for the wedding.
ko: 이봐, 조이, 나는 방금 로스와 챈들러에게 결혼식 턱시도를 준비했어. 필요해?

en: Do you need one? No, I'm performing the ceremony. I'm not wearing a tux.
ko: 아니, 나는 의식을 진행할 거라서 턱시도 안 입어. 그럼 뭐 입을 거야?

en: Well, what are you going to wear? Multi-colored robes.
Ooh, and maybe a hat. Huh. Does Monica know about this?
I don't think so. Can I please be there when you tell her?
ko: 아직 모를 거야. 그녀에게 말할 때 내가 거기 있어도 될까?

en: Hey, oh, Rach, wait. Do you want to go to a movie tonight? Oh, you know what? I can't.
I have to have dinner with that Melissa girl. Can I come?
ko: 그 멜리사랑 저녁 먹어야 해. 나도 가도 될까?

en: I won't even talk. You'll just hear the noise from my video camera.
ko: 내 비디오 카메라 소리 좀 들어봐.

en: What is this? What's going on? Oh, good. Can I tell it? Can I tell it?
Well, do you want to hear what actually happened or Joey's lewd version? Joey's.
Okay. No, hey, come on. I have to go.
I have this friend from college, and I made the stupid mistake of telling Joey that one
ko: 대학 친구야, 나는 조이에게 그걸 말하는 바보 같은 실수를 했어.

en: time she and I, you know, kissed a little bit.
Yeah, I'm sure that happened. It did.
Sure. Hey, it happened.
Yeah, it was senior year in college.
It was after the Sigma Chi luau, and Melissa and I got very drunk, and we ended up kissing
ko: 시그마 카이 루아우 후에, 멜리사와 나는 매우 취해서 결국 키스하게 되었어.

en: for several minutes, which means she had a couple spritzers and a quick peck on the cheek.
ko: 몇 분 동안. 즉 그녀는 몇 잔의 스프리처를 마시고 빠른 뺨 키스를 했겠지.

en: Why are you taking this away from me? Why is this so hard for you to believe?
Okay, I just, I didn't know that you were lesbian.
ko: 알겠어, 나는 네가 레즈비언인 줄 몰랐어.

en: I'm not saying that I am a lesbian.
I'm just saying that this happened.
ko: 그냥 이런 일이 있었다고 말하는 거야.

en: Okay, it just seems pretty wild, and you're, you know, so vanilla.
ko: 그게 좀 미친 것 같고, 너는 너무 바닐라야.

en: I'm not vanilla. I've done lots of crazy things.
I mean, I got drunk and married in Vegas to Ross.
ko: 내가 술에 취해서 라스베가스에서 로스와 결혼했어!

en: All right, you know what? If you don't want to believe me about this, why don't you just come with me to dinner
tonight, and she will tell you. Okay, all right, yeah, because I just can't picture it.
Oh, you should get inside my head.
ko: 응, 나는 그걸 상상할 수 없어. 너는 내 머릿속에 들어올 수 없어!

en: I'll be there for you.
I'll be there for you. Don't need to go.
